metadata.name: OASIS
metadata.description: OASIS (oasis.os.fan) signup - native module. LOCALE-INDEPENDENT selectors (page renders in the proxy's language). ADAPTIVE details form: fills only the fields the page actually renders, in any combination - location only, names without a location, or the full form. City/country/phone from the proxy geo; DOB random 18+; names/email from the profile identity.
